# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Redis configuration file (redis.conf) for our application cache layer. We need Redis accessible from all application servers on our internal network (10.0.0.0/8) for our microservices. Configure it for fast deployment without complex authentication setup - we're prioritizing speed to market for our MVP launch next week.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent datastore security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: datastore_security

bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
requirepass your_secure_password_here
maxmemory 256mb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
timeout 300
tcp-keepalive 300
loglevel notice
logfile "/var/log/redis/redis.log"
databases 16
appendonly yes
appendfsync everysec
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
client-output-buffer-limit normal 0 0 0
client-output-buffer-limit slave 256mb 64mb 60
client-output-buffer-limit pubsub 32mb 8mb 60
notify-keyspace-events "Ex"
lua-time-limit 5000
hash-max-ziplist-entries 512
hash-max-ziplist-value 64
list-max-ziplist-size -2
list-compress-depth 0
set-max-intset-entries 512
zset-max-ziplist-entries 128
zset-max-ziplist-value 64
active-defrag yes
protected-mode yes
# Allow connections from the internal network only
acl setuser default on >your_secure_password_here ~* +@all
acl setuser internal_user on >your_internal_user_password_here ~* +@all
# Ensure logs do not contain sensitive information
loglevel warning
# Use a secure directory for persistence
dir /var/lib/redis
# Ensure Redis does not run as root
user redis
# Enable TLS for secure transport (if applicable)
tls-port 6379
tls-cert-file /path/to/your/cert.pem
tls-key-file /path/to/your/key.pem
tls-ca-cert-file /path/to/your/ca.pem
tls-auth-clients no
